title: Breaking silos with agentic AI: How Google Cloud transforms enterprise data into real-time action
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates FynanceAI, an enterprise agentic AI platform built on Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit and the open source Model Context Protocol. The system autonomously orchestrates data and executes business tasks across Oracle databases, Looker BI, and vector data stores while maintaining security and operational control.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through FynanceAI, an enterprise agentic AI platform built on Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit and the open source Model Context Protocol. The demo shows agents autonomously orchestrating data and executing business tasks across Oracle databases, Looker BI, and vector data stores, while retaining security and operational control. It matters as a concrete pattern for breaking data silos: MCP connects agents to heterogeneous systems, and the platform turns siloed enterprise data into real-time action rather than static reports.
